final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial fashion photo for a high-end womenswear campaign featuring a structural white dress.

Style/medium: high-contrast fashion photography in the spirit of Helmut Newton, editorial commercial grade, sharp and crisp
Composition: three-quarter profile pose, model at 45-degree angle to camera, head slightly tilted upward, elegant and upright posture
Subject: female model in a pure white structural gown with architectural silhouette, exaggerated 3D shoulder construction, cinched waist, A-line skirt flare, fierce and confident gaze
Scene/backdrop: seamless white cyclorama background, minimal studio environment
Lighting/mood: butterfly lighting setup, key light from 45 degrees above center, strong highlight-to-shadow contrast emphasizing garment structure, dramatic and bold
Color palette: achromatic base of black, white and gray, deep crimson red on lips as sole accent
Materials/textures: crisp fabric with sharp folds and architectural edges, smooth skin, matte white backdrop
Avoid: soft lighting, pastel colors, cluttered background, over-retouched skin, 8K stuffer words, generic stock photo aesthetic
